name: Kernel Constants: Coherence Activation + Silver-Ratio MLP + Z/8Z Heads + Palindrome LR
author: beanapologist
val_metrics_note: Placeholder — update with mean val_bpb from 3-seed runs (seeds 1337, 42, 2025) before final submission.
significance_methodology: One-sided paired t-test (df=2) over 3 seeds at p<0.01; t-threshold=6.965. Null hypothesis: mean val_bpb improvement vs prior SOTA <= 0. Rejected when mean_delta / (std / sqrt(3)) > 6.965, or equivalently when all three seeds individually beat prior SOTA by >= 0.005 nats.
lean_theorems: formal-lean/Quantization.lean: lead_quantization_confirmed (Q1.2 quant_phase_eight_cycle, Q3.1 quant_floquet_phase, Q4.1 quant_amplitude_balance, Q4.3 quant_amplitude_coherence_max, Q2.2 quant_energy_ground)
blurb: Wires formal-Lean-4-verified kernel constants from CriticalEigenvalue.lean and Quantization.lean into the model. Architecture: (1) Coherence activation C(r)=2r/(1+r²) replaces relu² in every MLP block; (2) Silver ratio δS=1+√2≈2.414 sets the MLP hidden-dimension multiplier; (3) Z/8Z head binding sets NUM_HEADS=MU_ORBIT_SIZE=8 so each head occupies one distinct μ-orbit slot; (4) palindrome-precession warmdown LR uses the same coherence function; (5) 8-cycle closure quantization regularizer L(θ)=λ·(1−cos(8θ)) from Quantization.lean lead_quantization_confirmed (μ^8=1, Q1.2), ENABLED BY DEFAULT (USE_QUANT_REGULARIZER=1). Fix applied: regularizer was previously disabled by default causing Quantization.lean conditions to be silently ignored during training; default changed to enabled and observability logging added for all five lead_quantization_confirmed conditions.
